case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. MIEN NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, MIEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: VACATED ON MARCH 10, 2002 $4,233.30 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,884.30, CREDIT $100.
